lines: Stop. [long pause] Right here. [long pause] Whatever your mind is doing right now — the spinning, the what-ifs, the worst-case scenarios — we're going to interrupt that.
Anxiety is your brain's alarm system. [long pause] It's not broken. [long pause] It's just firing a false alarm. [long pause] And we're going to turn the volume down.

First, your breath. [long pause] Box breathing. [long pause] Four equal counts. [long pause] In. [long pause] Hold. [long pause] Out. [long pause] Hold. [long pause] This resets your heart rate variability — it's like a manual override for your nervous system.
Breathe in... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
Hold... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
Breathe out... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
Hold... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
In... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
Hold... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
Out... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
Hold... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
In... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
Hold... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
Out... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
Hold... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
In... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
Hold... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
Out... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
Hold... [long pause] [long pause] two... [long pause] [long pause] three... [long pause] [long pause] four.
Good. [long pause] Now your body is calmer. [long pause] Let's work on your mind.

Here's what I want you to understand. [long pause] You are not your thoughts. [long pause] Thoughts are events. [long pause] They come and go. [long pause] They're not facts. [long pause] They're not predictions. [long pause] They're just your brain generating noise.
So instead of fighting a thought, we're going to do something different. [long pause] We're going to notice it. [long pause] Label it. [long pause] And let it pass.
Whatever thought is causing the most distress right now — bring it forward. [long pause] Don't push it away. [long pause] Look at it.
Now say this to yourself: I notice I'm having the thought that... [long pause] [long pause]
And fill in the blank. [long pause] Whatever it is.
Say it again. [long pause] I notice I'm having the thought that... [long pause] [long pause]

Feel the difference? [long pause] You're not inside the thought anymore. [long pause] You're watching it. [long pause] You're the observer, not the participant. [long pause] That distance — that tiny shift — is everything.
The thought is still there. [long pause] That's fine. [long pause] It doesn't need to go away. [long pause] It just doesn't get to drive.
Fear not, for I am with you.
You don't have to figure everything out right now. [long pause] You just have to get through this moment. [long pause] And you already are.
Breathe in slowly. [long pause] And out.
You're okay. [long pause] Not because the anxiety is gone — but because you're bigger than it.
